evidence.title: README (segment 1)
README (segment 2)
README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: A fast, lightweight, and scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate iOS, macOS, tvOS, and visionOS release workflows from your terminal, IDE, or CI/CD pipeline.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: - [asc skills](#asc-skills) - [Sponsors](#sponsors) - [Quick Start](#quick-start) - [Wall of Apps](#wall-of-apps) - [Common Workflows](#common-workflows) - [Commands and Reference](#commands-and-reference) - [Documentation](#documentation) - [Contributing](#contributing) - [License](#license)

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: Agent Skills for automating `asc` workflows including builds, TestFlight, metadata sync, submissions, and signing: https://github.com/rudrankriyam/app-store-connect-cli-skills

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: [Rork](https://rork.com/) helps you build real mobile apps by chatting with AI, going from idea to phone in minutes and to the App Store in hours.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: For source builds and contributor setup, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).

evidence.title: Canonicalize IAP pricing under a single `asc iap pricing` tree

## What's Changed * apps wall: add Geeps: AI Chat BYOK by @svkozak in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/940 * feat: add subscriptions pricing equalize command by @Abdo-codes in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/941 * feat: add deep MISSING_METADATA diagnostics to validate subscriptions by @Abdo-codes in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/942 ## New Contributors * @svkozak made their first contribution in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/940 * @Abdo-codes made their first contribution in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/941 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/compare/0.38.2...0.38.3

## What's Changed * apps wall: add Ripple News - AI Personal News by @jimripple in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/932 * apps wall: add BitLocal: BTC-Friendly Shops by @joeycast in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/933 * Add Sunbreak: Nightly App Blocker to Wall of Apps by @WilsonLimSet in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/934 * apps wall: add Pets Check-in - PeekaPaw by @hiepllp in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/936 * test: cover apps wall submit validation regressions by @cursor[bot] in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/937 * fix: allow internal groups in builds add-groups by @rudrankriyam in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/939 ## New Contributors * @WilsonLimSet made their first contribution in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/934 * @hiepllp made their first contribution in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/936 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/compare/0.38.1...0.38.2

## What's Changed * Add 5 apps to Wall of Apps (amahanti) by @amahanti in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/926 * Add 'Ryform Golf' app entry to wall of apps by @ajxbit in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/927 * feat: replace wall generator with submit command by @rudrankriyam in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/930 * apps wall: add Smart Music Stations: Wavyy by @rudrankriyam in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/929 ## New Contributors * @amahanti made their first contribution in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/926 * @ajxbit made their first contribution in https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/pull/927 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI/compare/0.38.0...0.38.1
